title: utania volubilis
intro: Utania volubilis, also known as the "Australian Violet", is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Australia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Utania volubilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Utania volubilis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", Urtania volubilis (also known as Uncaria tomentosa) benefits include improved repair of DNA single strand breaks and double strand breaks after radiation exposure.
